creator: neal@nelson.name
text:
I have reviewed the patch and it all seems OK, however I am currently 
moving countries so I am unable to try the patch for myself so I shall 
just have to trust that it all works OK.

Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of x11-toolkits/py-wxPython28,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/118919 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/118919
>
